texts.content:
Campus Fitness Center – Membership Renewal Notice

Dear Members,

Your annual fitness center membership will expire on March 31. To continue using the facility, please renew your membership by April 7.

Renewal options:
- Annual plan: $180 (save $36)
- Semester plan: $108

New this year: Free yoga classes every Tuesday and Thursday at 6 p.m.

Renew online at studentportal.edu or in person at the Fitness Center front desk.

Campus Fitness Center Staff

questions.stem: What is the deadline for membership renewal?
questions.explanation: The email states that members must renew by April 7 to continue using the facility.

questions.stem: What new benefit is mentioned in the notice?
questions.explanation: The email mentions free yoga classes every Tuesday and Thursday at 6 p.m. as a new benefit.

texts.content:
University Cafeteria – Updated Spring Hours

Starting April 1, the main cafeteria will operate on the following schedule:

Breakfast: 7:00 a.m. – 9:30 a.m.
Lunch: 11:00 a.m. – 2:30 p.m.
Dinner: 5:00 p.m. – 8:00 p.m.

Weekend hours remain unchanged.

The grab-and-go station will now offer fresh sushi on Wednesdays and Fridays. Gluten-free and vegan options are available at every meal.

Questions? Contact dining@university.edu

questions.stem: When can students get fresh sushi at the grab-and-go station?
questions.explanation: The notice states that fresh sushi is available on Wednesdays and Fridays.
